abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of infatuating attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect:
Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being infatuated.

Overworld: If the first Pokémon in the party has this ability, any wild Pokémon whose species can be either gender has a 2/3 chance of being set to the opposite gender, and a 1/3 chance of having a random gender as usual.

abilities.shortEffect: Turns the bearer's Normal moves into Fairy moves and strengthens them to 1.3× their power.
abilities.effect: Turns the bearer's Normal-type moves into Fairy moves.  Moves changed by this ability have 1.3× their power.
